title: Valid Parentheses
hints: Notice that the most recently opened bracket must be the first one closed. This suggests a last-in, first-out structure.
Use a stack to track open brackets. When you encounter a closing bracket, check if it matches the top of the stack.
Iterate through the string. Push open brackets onto the stack. For closing brackets, pop and verify the match. The string is valid if the stack is empty at the end.
